projectDescription: A Claude Code skill that performs traditional Chinese Four Pillars (八字) astrology analysis through interactive conversation, referencing nine classical texts to deliver professional birth chart readings.
keyFeatures: Interactive step-by-step birth data collection (name, solar/lunar date, shichen, gender, birthplace)
Automatic Four Pillars (四柱) calculation: Year, Month, Day, and Hour pillars
Ten Gods (十神) and Hidden Stems (藏干) derivation
Major Luck Cycles (大运) direction and onset age calculation
Annual Luck (流年) analysis for current and near-future years
Five-element balance, pattern/格局 determination, and favorable/unfavorable gods
Historical event calibration to verify and refine the reading
Analysis grounded in nine classical Chinese astrology texts
publicApiSurface: Trigger keywords: 算八字, 看八字, 批八字, 排八字, 四柱, 命盘, 算命, 排盘, bazi
SKILL.md — skill entry point consumed by Claude Code
references/wuxing-tables.md — Five-elements, stems/branches, Ten Gods, Hidden Stems tables
references/shichen-table.md — Shichen lookup and Five-Rat Escaping method
references/dayun-rules.md — Major Luck Cycles ordering and onset calculation
references/classical-texts.md — Core rules extracted from nine canonical texts
